narrative:
Saltcreek-South (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,003 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
